case_title: RENT A CENTER VS NORRIS, LAKEISHA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $638.00 FILED BY RENT A CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS, LAKEISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRIS, LAKEISHA $638.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $738.00, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECEIVE THE JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO ALSO RECEIVE THE FURNITURE FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
